services_supported: plumbing and gas line connections for hot tubs
integration_constraints: Requires integration with Jobber and QuickBooks.
after_hours_flow_summary: Ben is the primary on‑call contact after hours and on weekends; calls may be routed to him directly or to voicemail. Clara can answer 24/7 and forward notifications via email, text, or dashboard.
office_hours_flow_summary: During regular hours Clara answers calls, routes them to appropriate team members, can book site visits, and supports club‑membership priority scheduling. Calls can be logged in the Jobber system.
questions_or_unknowns: What are the exact ending time for regular business hours?
Which days of the week constitute regular business days?
What is the official office address?
Is there a designated fallback action for non‑emergency calls (e.g., voicemail or email)?
Are there additional emergency contacts besides Ben?
notes: Client is currently a sole proprietorship planning to incorporate later in the year; Ben is owner and primary contact, with an operations manager (Greg) joining soon.
